🌊 Feature Request: TIDE X Surf Bali v1.0

Overview

Build a premium surf forecasting and booking platform for Balangan Beach, Bali using modern web technologies.

---

Core Features

🌊 Live Surf Dashboard

Display real-time marine and weather conditions.

Metrics

- Wave Height
- Swell Height
- Swell Period
- Wave Direction
- Wind Speed
- Wind Direction
- Wind Gust
- Water Temperature
- Air Temperature
- Humidity
- Visibility
- UV Index
- Rain Probability
- High Tide
- Low Tide
- Surf Rating

---

📈 Forecast

Hourly Forecast

- Next 24 Hours
- Wave Chart
- Wind Chart
- Tide Chart

Daily Forecast

- 7-Day Forecast
- Surf Rating
- Recommended Skill Level

---

🏄 Surf Lessons

Support:

- Private Lesson
- Semi Private
- Group Lesson
- Kids Lesson
- Intermediate Coaching
- Surf Guiding
- Surf Packages

---

📅 Booking System

Features:

- Online Booking
- Calendar
- Time Slots
- WhatsApp Booking
- Booking Status
- Customer Management

---

🌍 Surf Spots

Include:

- Balangan Beach
- Dreamland
- Bingin
- Padang Padang
- Uluwatu
- Impossible
- Nyang Nyang

Each surf spot should display:

- Current Conditions
- Difficulty
- Wave Quality
- Description
- Photos
- Map Location

---

📰 Forecast Articles

Support:

- Surf Forecast
- Weather News
- Travel Guides
- Surf Tips

---

🔄 Data Sources

Stormglass

Marine Data

- Waves
- Swell
- Tide
- Water Temperature

Open-Meteo

Weather Data

- Air Temperature
- Wind
- Humidity
- Visibility
- UV Index
- Sunrise
- Sunset

---

🗄 Database

Supabase

Tables:

- surf_conditions
- forecast
- surf_spots
- bookings
- instructors
- forecast_articles

Base44

Entities:

- SurfSpot
- ForecastArticle
- Booking

---

🎨 UI

Theme:

- Premium
- Dark Ocean
- Glassmorphism
- Mobile Responsive

---

⚙ Backend

- Supabase Edge Functions
- Automatic Sync Every 30 Minutes
- Base44 Synchronization
- API Cache
- Error Logging

---

🚀 Deployment

- GitHub
- Vercel
- Supabase
- Base44

---

Future Features

- AI Surf Recommendation
- Live Surf Camera
- Push Notifications
- Apple Weather Support
- Surfline-style Charts
- Multi-language Support
- Offline PWA
- Instructor Dashboard
- Customer Accounts

---

Goal

Create the most modern surf forecasting and surf lesson platform for Balangan Beach, Bali, combining live ocean conditions, accurate weather forecasts, and a seamless booking experience in a single application.
